svg.title: Azure AI Agents Architecture Overview
svg.desc: Diagram showing Azure AI Agent Service with tool execution, function calling, stateful memory, and human approval flows

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a user interact with Azure AI Agents?')
sendPrompt('What is the Azure AI Agent Service core?')
sendPrompt('How does stateful thread memory work in Azure AI Agents?')
sendPrompt('What built-in tools does Azure AI Agent Service support?')
sendPrompt('How does function calling work in Azure AI Agents?')
sendPrompt('What is human-in-the-loop approval in Azure AI Agents?')
sendPrompt('What is a Run in Azure AI Agent Service?')
